description: gatherBurp is a powerful BurpSuite security testing extension with multiple vulnerability detection features.
notes: Main Features: Integrates multiple vulnerability detection features including Fastjson scanning, SQL injection detection, Log4j vulnerability detection, URL redirection detection, etc.
Application Scenarios: Web application penetration testing, vulnerability mining, permission testing, information collection
Technical Features: Supports DNS callback detection, JNDI exploitation chain detection, unauthorized access detection, multi-level route scanning, Nuclei template generation, etc.
Notes: Please delete the .gather folder in the user directory before use to avoid conflicts
